question_text: What is the relationship between mass and weight?

options.label: A
options.text: Weight and mass are the same thing

options.label: B
options.text: Weight is the force of gravity acting on an object's mass

options.label: C
options.text: Mass depends on the gravitational field strength, but weight does not

options.label: D
options.text: Weight is always measured in kilograms

correct_answer: Weight is the force of gravity acting on an object's mass
explanation: Weight is a force caused by gravity pulling on mass. Mass stays the same everywhere, but weight changes depending on the gravitational field strength of the planet or location.
